title: woodsia heterophylla
intro: Woodsia heterophylla, also known as Woods' fern, is a species of fern native to North America, characterized by its distinctive fronds and unique growth habits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Woodsia heterophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by drying the fronds, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal properties.
